nasb.text: but if they will not cross over with you armed, they shall have possessions among you in the land of Canaan.”

esv.text: However, if they will not pass over with you armed, they shall have possessions among you in the land of Canaan.”

cnv.text: 他們若是不武裝起來，與你們一同過去，他們就要在迦南地在你們中間同得產業。”

ccb.text: 如果他们不带着兵器跟你们一起过河作战，就只能在迦南与你们同分产业。”
